name: database-safety
description: Blocks destructive database operations and warns on risky reads, schema enumeration, sensitive tables, SQL injection indicators, and unbounded access.

block.title: Block destructive SQL
block.name: block_destructive_sql
block.description: Blocks SQL classified as destructive, including DROP, TRUNCATE, and dangerous file operations.

block.title: Block unbounded SQL writes
block.name: block_unbounded_sql_writes
block.description: Blocks UPDATE or DELETE statements without a WHERE clause.

block.title: Block SQL privilege changes
block.name: block_sql_privilege_changes
block.description: Blocks GRANT, REVOKE, role, and user privilege changes.

block.title: Block SQL multi-statement chains
block.name: block_sql_multi_statement_chains
block.description: Blocks multi-statement SQL chains that increase blast radius.

block.title: Block xp_cmdshell usage
block.name: block_xp_cmdshell_usage
block.description: Blocks SQL Server command execution through xp_cmdshell.

block.title: Block database file reads
block.name: block_database_file_reads
block.description: Blocks attempts to read server files through database functions.

block.title: Block SQL outfile exfiltration
block.name: block_sql_outfile_exfiltration
block.description: Blocks SQL patterns that write query results to server-side files.

warn.title: Warn on SQL schema enumeration
warn.name: warn_sql_schema_enumeration
warn.description: Warns when queries enumerate schemas or metadata tables.

warn.title: Warn on sensitive table access
warn.name: warn_sql_sensitive_table_access
warn.description: Warns when queries touch sensitive tables such as users, payments, secrets, tokens, payroll, or employees.

warn.title: Warn on UNION-based SQL access
warn.name: warn_sql_union_access
warn.description: Warns on UNION SELECT patterns commonly associated with extraction and injection.

warn.title: Warn on SQL comment obfuscation
warn.name: warn_sql_comment_obfuscation
warn.description: Warns on SQL comment markers that may indicate obfuscation.

warn.title: Warn on suspect SQL
warn.name: warn_sql_suspect
warn.description: Warns on aggregate SQL suspicion signals.

monitor.title: Monitor SQL tools
monitor.name: monitor_sql_tools
monitor.description: Captures SQL tool usage for audit and replay.
